summary: Complete E2E Testing of 4 NEW Features: Provider Credential Config, Slack Alert Integration, Monitoring Trend Charts, and Provider Validation. Backend: 20/20 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified including Provider Config tab with HotelRunner/Exely cards, Slack config panel with toggle/webhook/severity buttons, and Trend Charts with time range selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: Provider Config router correctly implements credential storage with encryption via credential_vault.py
Validation endpoints properly run checklist for both HotelRunner (connection_test, room_list, rate_plan_list, reservation_pull) and Exely (connection_test, room_discovery, reservation_pull)
Slack dispatch configuration supports webhook URL, enabled toggle, and severity filtering
Trends endpoint correctly returns time-series data with ingest/ari/recon/queue arrays
Frontend Provider Config tab displays credential fields with proper data-testid attributes
Slack config panel has toggle, webhook URL input, severity buttons (critical/high/medium/info), and save/test buttons
Trend charts panel has time range selector (6h/12h/24h/48h) and 4 metric sub-panels
seed_data_creation: Test credentials created during backend tests (hotelrunner: TEST_* prefixed, exely: TEST_* prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 NEW features tested and verified: 1) Provider Config tab at /data-model with HotelRunner and Exely credential cards (data-testid='provider-config-tab', 'provider-config-hotelrunner', 'provider-config-exely', 'cred-hotelrunner-token', etc.), 2) Slack config panel in Monitoring tab (data-testid='slack-config-panel', 'slack-toggle', 'slack-webhook-url', 'slack-severity-critical/high/medium/info', 'save-slack-config'), 3) Trend charts panel in Monitoring tab (data-testid='trend-charts-panel', 'trend-hours-6/12/24/48', 'trend-ingest', 'trend-ari', 'trend-recon', 'trend-queue'), 4) Provider validation endpoints working (validate, test-connection, readiness). Login requires pressing Enter key to submit form.

provider_config: GET /api/channel-manager/config/providers — 200 OK (returns both hotelrunner and exely with field definitions)
slack_integration: GET /api/channel-manager/monitoring/dispatch-config — 200 OK (returns Slack config with enabled, webhook_url, severities)
POST /api/channel-manager/monitoring/dispatch-config/slack/test — 400 (returns error when no webhook configured as expected)
trend_charts: GET /api/channel-manager/monitoring/trends — 200 OK (returns time-series data with ingest/ari/recon/queue arrays)

screenshots_captured.provider_config: Shows HotelRunner and Exely cards with credential forms, Test Connection and Full Validation buttons
screenshots_captured.slack_config: Shows Alert Dispatch — Slack panel with toggle enabled, webhook URL 'https://hooks.slack.com/test', severity buttons
screenshots_captured.trend_charts: Shows Trend Charts — Last 24h with 11 data points, 6h/12h/24h/48h buttons, 4 metric panels (Ingest Pipeline, ARI Push, Reconciliation, Queue & Workers)
